title: micromeria graeca var. angustifolia-glabrata
intro: Micromeria graeca var. angustifolia-glabrata, a subspecies of the Micromeria graeca plant, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Micromeria graeca var. angustifolia-glabrata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
